description_long: This object is a modern shotgun with a matte black finish, featuring a streamlined and tactical design. The stock is integrated with the main body and has a pronounced ergonomic grip, likely made for comfortable handling. The barrel is long and cylindrical, with no visible ribbing or venting, and the fore-end appears to be designed for pump-action operation. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, providing ample space for finger placement and protection. The receiver section is slightly raised and includes visible details such as a loading port and ejection port. The overall construction suggests durability and functionality, suitable for urban law enforcement or security scenarios.
description: A matte black, tactical shotgun with an ergonomic grip, long barrel, and pump-action fore-end, designed for durability and urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow, cylindrical barrel and the centered alignment of the stock and receiver.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the shotgun, ergonomic grip, pump-action fore-end, and integrated stock.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the end of the stock and the symmetrical alignment of the shotgun's body.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing similar features to view 1, with clear visibility of the trigger guard and action mechanism.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, standard barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, moderately sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves
